name: mapsoo-worldsmith
description: Open-source world asset generator and Godot export pipeline.

scripts.check: pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build
scripts.release:build: pnpm typecheck && vite build --base / && node scripts/build-release.mjs
scripts.release:local: pnpm release:build && pnpm release:verify && pnpm release:repro
